---
title: "import"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(haven)
library(here)
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
```



import data
```{r}
raw_llcp2024 <- read_xpt(
  here(
    "data",
    "LLCP2024.XPT"
    )
)

dbWriteTable(
  conn = con,
  name = Id(schema = "raw",
            table = "raw_llcp2024"),
  value = raw_llcp2024,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

dbGetQuery(con, "
           SELECT COUNT(*)
           FROM raw.raw_llcp2024;
           ")

dbDisconnect(con)
```
